issues.detail: The skill references a Claude-specific file path, limiting compatibility to Claude agents.

scenarios.name: Audit a SaaS site that lost 35% organic traffic after a Next.js migration
scenarios.rationale: Treatment follows the documented priority order (crawlability/indexation first, then technical, then on-page), checks redirect chains/canonicals/SSR rendering, and references Search Console + PageSpeed Insights; baseline jumps to generic advice without the audit ordering.

scenarios.name: On-page audit for a 'wireless earbuds' category page stuck on page 3
scenarios.rationale: Treatment delivers the documented Issue/Impact/Evidence/Fix/Priority output structure, references the Core Web Vitals thresholds (LCP <2.5s, INP <200ms, CLS <0.1) and product/BreadcrumbList schema, and benchmarks against top competitors; baseline gives a generic checklist without competitor comparison or the structured output.
